creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
> Please note that PR ports/136846 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136846
> 

FYI - I'm willing to go with this as long as it's what I think it is 
(bringing the startup script "up to standards" with the latest rc 
environment).  I admit I haven't actually tested it yet but this would 
be the 2nd update to the startup script.  Perhaps it's time to update 
the source tarball?

In any case, thanks.  I'll have to take a look at this more closely when 
I get a chance.
